# Daily Report — 2026-04-26

## Task Completed
Added CMDB configuration item tools: `list_cis`, `get_ci`, `create_ci`, and `update_ci`.
The new `cmdb_tools.py` module queries the `cmdb_ci` base table (or any subclass such as
`cmdb_ci_server`) via the standard Table API. Filters include CI class, name (LIKE), operational
status, environment, and a raw query string. `create_ci` and `update_ci` accept all common CMDB
fields (ip_address, serial_number, asset_tag, managed_by, owned_by, location, company, etc.).
Tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (`system_administrator`
and `full` packages), and documented with 45 unit tests.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 725 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 90% overall; cmdb_tools.py at 98%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level vulnerabilities in pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt — not in project code.

- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py

- tests/test_cmdb_tools.py (new)
